mapper.select: select receiver_id from messenger_alarm where alarm_id = #{alarmId}
select * from messenger_alarm where receiver_id = #{empId} and created_at >= trunc(sysdate) order by created_at desc
select * from messenger_alarm where receiver_id = #{empId} order by created_at desc
select count(*) from messenger_alarm where receiver_id = #{empId} and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update messenger_alarm set is_read = true where receiver_id = #{empId}
